title: Ketos' escape vessel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Ketoescapeship.jpg|thumb|Ketos' escape vessel.]]
The '''Ketos' escape vessel''' was the ship [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]] and [[Aleema Keto]] used to escape [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] during the end of the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]

[[Category:Tetan starships]]
